case_title: JOSEPH GERSON VS. RENATA RODRIGUEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO NAME PROPER PARTY TO JAN-11-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE PRO TEM SAMUEL LAM.
